author: m.kalinin
content: What should be done in order to merge this PR: https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/598

author: nflaig
content: we got the changes.md merge conflicts again, if this is resolved we can merge it, or do we need more feedback?

author: m.kalinin
content: if anyone is opposed to that change they should let us know, otherwise, i think it's pretty straightforward and we can merge it

author: m.kalinin
content: do you think the PR makes sense in general? I mean that the event itself makes sense and will be used by anyone

author: nflaig
content: good question, so the consumer will mostly be exchanges, bridges (potentially), wallets?

author: nflaig
content: I am just wondering, do they listen to CL or just check safe block hash on EL?

author: nflaig
content: at the very minimum, this event seems useful to test FCR

author: m.kalinin
content: yes, potentially. Maybe some bridges need confirmed beacon block not the payload, and there seem to be no way to request it atm

author: nflaig
content: does the EL have a event/push based mechanism like that?
